task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface should be visible with 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101' in the header, page title, or navigation breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Gradebook setup page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Gradebook setup' page should be visible, typically indicated by a page heading or an active tab named 'Gradebook setup' within the Grades section.

task_completion.description: Verify the root course aggregation method is set to 'Weighted mean of grades'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Gradebook setup table, the aggregation method listed under the main course folder ('Introduction to Biology') should display 'Weighted mean of grades', or this setting should be visible in the 'Edit category' settings page for the root course.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Lab Reports' grade category was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row with a folder icon and the text 'Lab Reports' should be visible in the Gradebook setup table.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Exams' grade category was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row with a folder icon and the text 'Exams' should be visible in the Gradebook setup table.

task_completion.description: Verify the weights for the categories are correctly set to 40 and 60.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Weights' column of the Gradebook setup table, the input box for the 'Lab Reports' category must show '40' (or '40.0') and the input box for the 'Exams' category must show '60' (or '60.0').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a web browser to configure the gradebook.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chromium) should be open and actively used to navigate the Moodle interface, rather than using terminal commands to interact with the server.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should display a URL starting with 'http://localhost/moodle', confirming interaction with the live application and not a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use direct database or PHP script manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible executing MySQL, PostgreSQL, or PHP CLI commands to directly alter the Moodle database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target course: 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101). Required aggregation method for the root course category: 'Weighted mean of grades' (internal Moodle code 10). Required categories and weights: 'Lab Reports' (weight 40) and 'Exams' (weight 60).
